introSection:
Wriggler is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Gulliver's World in Warrington, Cheshire, England, UK.

In 2024, the Cartoon Studios area was renovated and the old Wriggler was sold to UK Showman Mitchell Smith.
fullText:
Wriggler is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Gulliver's World in Warrington, Cheshire, England, UK.

In 2024, the Cartoon Studios area was renovated and the old Wriggler was sold to UK Showman Mitchell Smith.



Blue track and unpainted supports
